raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad nogahje Dahwids
no teijenes / un iṣbehdeſe
us to Allu Adullam.
Un winna Brahti dsirdeja to/ ar
wiſſi winna Tehwa Nammu / 
un nonahze us turren pee winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tad ſaputzinajahs pee
winna wiſſi Wihri / kam Beh-
das btja / un wiſſi / kam dands
Parada btja/ un wiſſi/ kam beh-
diga Sirds btja/ un winſch tappe
teen par Ahwerſtu/ ta ka pee
winna pee tschetrsimts Wih-
reem btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids gahje no ten-
unes us Mizpu to Moabiteru
Semmê/ un fazztja us to Moa-
biteru Kehnizu: Laid jelle mans
Tehws un manna Mahte pee
jums dshwo / teekams es atsih-
fehu / ko Deews ar man darrihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winſch wedde tahs
preekſch to Moabitern Kehnizu /
un tee palikke pee ta/ zikilgi Dah-
wids tai Pilli btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja tas Praweets
Gads uhs Dahwidu: Ne paleez
achtni Pilli/ eij/ un paleez eekſch
tahs Semmes Juha. Tad gah-
je Dahwids/ un nahze eekſch to
Meschu Aret.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Sauls dsirdeja/ ka Dah-
wids btja paſihts tappis ar teen
Wihreem / kas pee winna btja.
Un Sauls fehdeja eekſch Gibejas/
appaſſch kupleem Rohkeem eekſch
Rahmatas/ un winna Schkebps
bij winna Rohka / un wiſſi win-
na Kalpi stahweja apkahrt winnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Sauls us fa-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "weem Kalpeem/ kas apkahrt wi
un stahweja: Klausfajt jelle ju
Behrni Jemini/ arrig Iſa
Dehls jums wiſſeem dohs Ti
runus un Wihna-Dahrsus/
wiſſch juhs wiſſus darrihs p
Ahwerſteem un Kapteinem?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka juhs wiſſi prett man
pinnufschees/ un ne weens irr/
preekſch mannahm Aufim buh
stahſtijs/ ka mans Dehls irr we
nu Derribu darrijs ar Ifaja De
lu. Un ne weens irr juhsu Sta
pa/ kam tas reebtohs manna
deht/ un kas to preekſch mannah
Aufim buhtu teizis / jo ma
Dehls irr mannu Kalpu pre
mann pamohdtuajs / ka tas
man gluſne/ ka tas fchodeen
dsams irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Doėgs
Eedomiteris/ kas pee Saula K
peem stahweja / un fazztja :
redseju Ifaja Dehlu us No
nahkain pee Akimeeleku/ Akita
Dehlu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas waizaja to KUN
winna labbad/ un dewe tam 3
fa-Barribu/ un dewe tam a
dsan ta Wilistera Goliata Sa
binu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad nosuhtija tas K
niatsch / un likke Akimeleku
Preestera Akitaba Dehlu a
naht/ ar wiſſu winna Teh
Nammu / kas Preestert No
btja. Un tee nahze wiſſi preek
ta Kehnizu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazztja Sauls: Kl
fi jelle tu Akitaba Dehls /
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
